languages.text: [Знакомая ситуация, знакомые слова. Все повторяется — в ваших силах следовать тому, что предначертано, или попытаться разорвать цикл.]

traits.locale_text: [Знакомая ситуация, знакомые слова. Все повторяется по кругу вновь — в ваших силах следовать ему или попытаться разорвать цикл.]

languages.text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]
languages.original_text: [Знакомая ситуация, знакомые слова. Все повторяется — в ваших силах следовать тому, что предначертано, или попытаться разорвать цикл.]

traits.locale_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]
[The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]
[The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

languages.text: 【相同的局势，相同的说辞。一切都在重复。现在你可以选择按既定轨迹走下去，或是设法打破循环。】
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: 【相同的局势，相同的说辞。一切都在重复。现在你可以选择按既定轨迹走下去，或是设法打破循环。】

languages.text: [La même situation, les mêmes propos. Tout se répète une fois de plus. À présent, il ne tient qu'à vous de suivre le schéma prédéterminé ou de tenter de briser le cycle.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: [La même situation, les mêmes propos. Tout se répète une fois de plus. À présent, il ne tient qu'à vous de suivre le schéma prédéterminé ou de tenter de briser le cycle.]

languages.text: [Aynı durum, aynı sözler. Her şey kendini tekrar ediyor. Döngüyü takip mi edeceksin yoksa tamamen kırmaya mı çalışacaksın... Artık karar verebilirsin.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: [Aynı durum, aynı sözler. Her şey kendini tekrar ediyor. Döngüyü takip mi edeceksin yoksa tamamen kırmaya mı çalışacaksın... Artık karar verebilirsin.]

languages.text: [La misma situación. Las mismas palabras. Todo se repite. Ahora debes decidir si seguir el ciclo predestinado o intentar romperlo.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: [La misma situación. Las mismas palabras. Todo se repite. Ahora debes decidir si seguir el ciclo predestinado o intentar romperlo.]

languages.text: [Dieselbe Situation, dieselben Worte. Alles wiederholt sich. Du kannst nur der Bestimmung folgen oder versuchen, den Kreis zu durchbrechen.]
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: [Dieselbe Situation, dieselben Worte. Alles wiederholt sich. Du kannst nur der Bestimmung folgen oder versuchen, den Kreis zu durchbrechen.]

languages.text: 同じ状況、同じ言葉。繰り返されること。今、あなたは決断する。既定の道を進むか、このサイクルを破ろうとするか。
languages.original_text: [The same-old situation, the same-old words. Everything is repeating itself. Now you can decide whether to follow what is predetermined or to try to break the cycle.]

traits.locale_text: 同じ状況、同じ言葉。繰り返されること。今、あなたは決断する。既定の道を進むか、このサイクルを破ろうとするか。
